name: SDLC All Assessors Request Changes Pipeline
description: Software-delivery workflow where both assessors request changes before later approval.
outcome: Multiple required assessments can each demand rework on the same subject revision before eventual clearance.

definition.process_instructions: The design lead frames the change. The delivery engineer implements it. Both assessors are expected to request changes on an early revision before the later revision clears and packaging proceeds.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
